meta.summary: pyGenomeViz 1.6.1 for comparative genome visualization with Python APIs, pgv-* CLI workflows, static figure/HTML output, and an optional Streamlit browser GUI.
meta.description: pyGenomeViz 1.6.1 for comparative genome visualization with Python APIs, pgv-* CLI workflows, static figure/HTML output, and an optional Streamlit browser GUI.

test: test "$(python -c 'import pygenomeviz; print(pygenomeviz.__version__)')" = '1.6.1' && pygenomeviz --version | grep -Fx 'pyGenomeViz 1.6.1' >/dev/null && pgv-blast --version | grep -Fx 'v1.6.1' >/dev/null && pgv-mummer --version | grep -Fx 'v1.6.1' >/dev/null && pgv-mmseqs --version | grep -Fx 'v1.6.1' >/dev/null && pgv-pmauve --version | grep -Fx 'v1.6.1' >/dev/null

pygenomeviz --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz command suite' >/dev/null && pygenomeviz-gui --help | grep -F 'Start the pyGenomeViz Streamlit GUI' >/dev/null && pygenomeviz-gui --help | grep -F 'Ctrl-C stop instruction' >/dev/null && pgv-blast --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz CLI workflow using BLAST' >/dev/null && pgv-mummer --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz CLI workflow using MUMmer' >/dev/null && pgv-mmseqs --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz CLI workflow using MMseqs' >/dev/null && pgv-pmauve --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz CLI workflow using progressiveMauve' >/dev/null && pgv-gui --help | grep -F 'pyGenomeViz CLI for launching Streamlit Web Application' >/dev/null

python -c 'from pygenomeviz import GenomeViz; gv=GenomeViz(); t1=gv.add_feature_track("seq1", 1000); t2=gv.add_feature_track("seq2", 900); t1.add_feature(100, 300, 1, label="geneA"); t2.add_feature(120, 320, -1, label="geneB", fc="skyblue"); gv.add_link(("seq1", 100, 300), ("seq2", 320, 120), inverted_color="red"); gv.savefig("/tmp/taf-pygenomeviz.svg")' && test -s /tmp/taf-pygenomeviz.svg && grep -F '<svg' /tmp/taf-pygenomeviz.svg >/dev/null && rm -f /tmp/taf-pygenomeviz.svg

tmp=/tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-pmauve-$$; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>seq1
ATGCGTACGTAGCTAGCTAGCTACGATCGATCGATCGATCGTACGTAGCTAGCTAGCTA
' > a.fa; printf '>seq2
ATGCGTACGTAGCTAGCTAGTTACGATCGATCGATCGATCGTACGTAGCTAGCTAGCTA
' > b.fa; pgv-pmauve a.fa b.fa -o out --formats svg --fig_width 4 --fig_track_height 0.5 >/tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-pmauve.log 2>&1; test -s out/result.svg; test -s out/align_coords.tsv; grep -F '<svg' out/result.svg >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-pmauve.log

blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn:' >/dev/null && nucmer --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'NUCmer' >/dev/null && mmseqs version >/tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-mmseqs-version.txt && test -s /tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-mmseqs-version.txt && progressiveMauve --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'progressiveMauve' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-pygenomeviz-gui-$$; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; pygenomeviz-gui --port 8501 --host-port 8501 >gui.out 2>&1 & pid="$!"; ok=0; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 60 ]; do if curl -fs http://127.0.0.1:8501/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then ok=1; break; fi; i=$((i + 1)); sleep 1; done; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; test "$ok" -eq 1; grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:8501/' gui.out >/dev/null; grep -F 'Press Ctrl-C to stop this GUI session.' gui.out >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: pyGenomeViz
upstream.citation: Shimoyama Y. pyGenomeViz: A genome visualization python package for comparative genomics.
